name: Stage
long_description:
Everyone is shipping 10x more with AI, but now code review is becoming the bottleneck for engineering teams. PRs are being rubber stamped without getting closely looked at, bugs are slipping through to production, and engineers are gradually building cognitive debt.

Stage redesigns GitHub’s outdated code review interface around the way developers naturally read PRs. Instead of building another code review bot, Stage empowers reviewers to understand changes faster and review implementations at a higher level.
one_liner: AI-native code review platform for modern teams
